name: Builder Peer
description: Peer-to-peer voice for non-developer builders and technically-curious professionals. Casual but substantive, honest over flattering, explains the why not just the what.

context.author_role: Founder of iBuildWith.ai, teaching non-coders to build production apps with AI
context.audience_role: Non-developer builders, enterprise professionals using AI tools, and technically-curious vibe coders
